plugins.name: auto-worktree
plugins.description: Automatically creates git worktrees when Claude modifies files, enabling safe parallel work without git conflicts.

plugins.name: dispatch
plugins.description: Launch an interactive Claude Code session in another repository and auto-report its result when it finishes.

plugins.name: rimo
plugins.description: Rimo Voice integration — the rimo-cli skill plus the `rimo mcp` server. Requires the rimo CLI on your PATH.

plugins.name: rimo-all
plugins.description: Installs all Rimo plugins together (auto-worktree + dispatch). A convenience bundle.
